name: How to Marry a Millionaire
overview: Zhenya krasilova is a determined and uncompromising person, she dreams of doing serious journalism and, at the very least, "save the world" by bringing the innermost truth of life to readers. However, in the meantime, she has to work part-time in a dubious yellow publication and compose scandalous stories about the life of the"stars". One day, an article "how to marry a millionaire" comes out from under her caustic pen, in which she strongly touches a well - known Metropolitan entrepreneur-Leonid Raevsky and his girlfriend. The Wife who has got under a hot hand has to make a bet with the offended oligarch. Within a month, she must prove that she really understands the material, and get some millionaire to make her an offer.
